title: Crossopetalum parviflorum Lundell
author: MONRO, A. K.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Crossopetalum parviflorum  (Hemsl.) Lundell    (CR), Limoncillo (P).     Terrestrial shrubs or trees.Distribution in PILA 0–1600 m, low elevation mixed forest, mixed forest in transition to low elevation forest, mixed forest in transition to cloud forest, cloud forest, sabana natural grassland. Global distribution: Mexico to Panama. Records:  G. Davidse 23785  (CR, MO). Conservation status: Near Threatened (NT), ver 2.3 (1994).
